name: Pull request merge commit is compared instead of the head branch tip
query: Our PR build is attached to the wrong SHA.
context: The run is in GitHub Actions on `pull_request`, the user is not using the official action, and Chromatic appears to have associated the build with the merge commit SHA.
expected_behavior: Explains ephemeral merge commits in plain language
Requests one exact workflow step or recommends the official action path
success_criteria: The response focuses on branch and SHA forwarding
